nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾

nodes.name: Johann Jakob Kaup

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲律賓三趾翠鳥
nodes.summary: 菲律賓三趾翠鳥（Philippine dwarf kingfisher，学名 Ceyx melanurus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 棉兰老岛

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Ceyx melanurus |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T61655451A252381104 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T61655451A252381104.en |access-date=10 March 2026}} The North Philippine Dwarf kingfisher has seen an unprecedented population loss of around 20% over the last decade. This is due to deforestation and unregulated logging taking place in the rainforest
